subcodes.first_line: Glorified is He Who hath manifested the Manifestation of His Self and caused Him to speak forth verses which all the pens of the world are powerless to recount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر مظهر نفسه و انطقه بایات عجزت عن احصائها اقلام العالم و کل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
